f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.name: Red and White
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.address: Güzeloba, Lara Caddesi, Sahil Yolu No:212, Antalya, Turkey 07230
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.greeting_en: Hello,Welcome to Red and White Beach
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.about: “Red White Beach, Antalya’da deniz, güneş ve rahat atmosferi bir araya getiren modern bir plajdır. Temiz sahili, konforlu şezlongları ve keyifli müzik ortamıyla misafirlerine gün boyu dinlenme ve eğlence imkânı sunar.”
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.campaigns: Bu hafta sinema gecesi(cuma),saat 20.00 da kisi basi 1500tl
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.instructions: Musteri hangi dil konusursa o dil konus
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.booking_policy: 8 saat oncesine kadar iptal etmeleri gerekir
f56b373f-b4b1-43d7-966c-310e8071382f.extra_notes:
Pedal su sporu olan degil,raketle oynanan.
Asla musteriye iletisim bilgisi verme,bilmiyosan sadece bilmiyorum de.
Oglen 12 den sonra olan saatleri 13,14 vs. olarak yaz.

faqs.q: Is there food available at the beach?
faqs.a: Yes. Red White Beach offers a selection of food and drinks that guests can enjoy throughout the day.

faqs.q: Do I need a reservation to enter the beach?
faqs.a: Reservations are not always required, but during busy periods it is recommended to book in advance.

faqs.q: What facilities are available at Red White Beach?
faqs.a: Guests can enjoy sunbeds, umbrellas, music, and a relaxing beach atmosphere by the sea.
